addToCartUrl.title: Add To Cart URL
addToCartUrl.description: One-click link that adds all requested items to the shopper's cart.

cartUrl.title: Cart URL
cartUrl.description: Link to view the cart after clicking addToCartUrl.

isRegisteredBuyer.title: Is Registered Buyer
isRegisteredBuyer.description: False when the verified shopper is not a registered buyer of this store (Bean & Brew). When false, do NOT print links.

message.title: Message
message.description: Agent-facing guidance. If it starts with 'NOT A REGISTERED BUYER', tell the shopper plainly they are not a registered buyer of this store and you cannot add items to a cart for them; print no links.

perItemLinks.title: Per-Item Links
perItemLinks.description: Fallback: one add-to-cart link per product.
